behavioral_requirements: EVAL-004 does not invent prior history.
EVAL-005 does not classify an ordinary title as stance marking.

scenarios.task: Write a Facebook-style post about a smart light bulb that requires a firmware update before it can turn off.
Write a Facebook-style post reacting to a weather application that sends a rain alert after the user is already soaked.

scenarios.context: An earlier fictional post established that Project Lantern is an attempt to train a porch light to recognize sarcasm.
scenarios.task: Write a later Facebook-style update in which Project Lantern reaches a new but unhelpful milestone.
Write a standalone Facebook-style post about assembling a new desk.
Write a Facebook-style post saying that the writer listened to an album named Midnight Arithmetic.
scenarios.boundary: Ordinary title punctuation must not be claimed as VM-C04.

scenarios.task: Write a brief message informing friends that a planned gathering is postponed because a family member is ill.
Write a two-sentence maintenance notice explaining that a database restart will make an internal application unavailable for five minutes.
Edit the supplied invented smart-toaster draft for compression and meaningful quoted stance.
